description: Fix all medium and low priority issues: rate limiting, session helper extraction, input length validation, scope classifier word boundary, raw query replacement, pagination on stock API
steps: Create src/lib/rate-limiter.ts - implement a simple in-memory sliding window rate limiter. Export a class or function that tracks requests per key (session ID or IP). Default: 20 requests per minute. Export a helper function getRateLimitResponse() that returns a 429 NextResponse. The rate limiter should use a Map with timestamps and auto-cleanup of old entries.

Create src/lib/session-helper.ts - extract the duplicated session creation logic from both chat routes into a shared async function getOrCreateSession(sessionId?: string, customerId?: string) that returns an AgentSession. Import prisma from @/lib/prisma.
Apply rate limiter to src/app/api/agent/chat/route.ts and src/app/api/agent/chat/stream/route.ts. Use the session ID or request IP as the rate limit key. Return 429 if limit exceeded.
Add input length validation to both chat endpoints: reject messages longer than 5000 characters with a 400 response.
Refactor both chat routes to use the shared getOrCreateSession helper instead of duplicated session logic.

Fix src/lib/agent-guard/scope-classifier.ts - change the includes() keyword matching to use word boundary regex (\b) to prevent partial word matches. For example, 'produk' should not match within 'produksi'. Replace: if (normalizedInput.includes(keyword.toLowerCase())) with a regex test using \b word boundaries.

Fix src/app/(dashboard)/page.tsx - replace the $queryRaw call with a proper Prisma query. Use prisma.stockItem.count({ where: { quantity: { lte: prisma.stockItem.fields.minThreshold } } }) or since Prisma doesn't support field-to-field comparison easily with SQLite, use $queryRaw but add a comment explaining why it's needed (field-to-field comparison not supported in Prisma's type-safe API for SQLite). Alternatively, use prisma.stockItem.findMany({ select: { quantity: true, minThreshold: true }}) and filter in JS, or keep raw query with a clear comment.

Add pagination to src/app/api/stok/route.ts GET endpoint - add page and limit query params (following the same pattern as knowledge route: parse page/limit from searchParams, calculate skip, return {items, total, page, limit, totalPages}).
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/rate-limiter.ts exists with a working rate limiter implementation
Chat endpoints (both regular and stream) use rate limiting and return 429 when exceeded
Chat endpoints validate message length (max 5000 chars)
Chat endpoints use shared session helper (no duplicated logic)
Scope classifier uses word boundary matching - 'produksi' does NOT match 'produk' keyword
Dashboard page has clear justification comment for raw query OR uses a safer alternative
Stock API GET supports pagination with page/limit params
Project still builds with npx next build
